name: huawei-dns
description: OctoBus package for Huawei Cloud DNS (Domain Name Service) zone and record set management APIs.

Huawei_DNS.Huawei_DNS/ListZones.name: list-zones
Huawei_DNS.Huawei_DNS/ListZones.description: List all DNS zones in the account.

Huawei_DNS.Huawei_DNS/ListRecordSets.name: list-record-sets
Huawei_DNS.Huawei_DNS/ListRecordSets.description: List DNS record sets in a zone.

Huawei_DNS.Huawei_DNS/CreateRecordSet.name: create-record-set
Huawei_DNS.Huawei_DNS/CreateRecordSet.description: Create a DNS record set in a zone.

Huawei_DNS.Huawei_DNS/DeleteRecordSet.name: delete-record-set
Huawei_DNS.Huawei_DNS/DeleteRecordSet.description: Delete a DNS record set from a zone.
